candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; includes main operating revenues. Other Operating Revenues is an add-on, not an alternative main revenue line.
Additional operating revenue but not the main total; used as secondary source only if Total Revenue were missing in some years.
Best match for direct production/input costs and thus COGS/cost of sales.
Total operating expenses including overhead; too broad and includes SG&A so not ideal for COGS.
Likely includes SG&A payroll, not strictly COGS; less precise than Materials and consumables for direct costs.
This is revenue, not an operating expense, so should NOT be treated as SG&A.
Typical SG&A/overhead bucket; excludes explicit COGS wording and is an operating expense component.
Total of multiple operating expense components; rule says avoid totals when components are available.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. SG&A is not presented as a single explicit SG&A line. The best overhead components are 'Payroll expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'. 'Payroll expenses' was not in the candidate list but is clearly an operating overhead item, so it has been added alongside 'Other operating expenses'. The total line 'Operating expenses' and revenue line 'Other Operating Revenues' are intentionally excluded per the rules. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll expenses

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Explicit R&D-related expense; while it is amortization of capitalized R&D rather than current-period R&D, it is the only R&D-specific P&L line available.
Balance sheet asset; not a period expense, so not suitable directly for XRD.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary total interest expense line, net of capitalized amounts; best single measure of interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of interest expense specifically related to lease liabilities; useful fallback if main interest expense were missing.
Residual non-lease interest expense; together with lease interest reconciles to total interest expense.
Net financing result including income and expense; less precise than pure interest expense for XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense labels are provided as a priority list. The main total line is listed first; component lines follow as fallbacks for years where the main line might be missing.

candidates.why: Represents equity attributable to shareholders of the parent, excluding non-controlling interests which are presented separately.
Includes both shareholders' equity and non-controlling interests; would double-count with MIB so not preferred.
Income allocation, not a balance sheet equity level; not appropriate for BE.
Balance sheet line for minority/non-controlling interests; primary source for MIB.
Duplicate naming of non-controlling interests; useful as an alternate label over time.
Income allocation to NCI; not a balance sheet amount but consistent with the same concept.
